texto: In an environment where there is a shared vision of excellence, where people can be the best they can be on a daily basis, where they know what is expected of them, understand that reward is linked to performance, and believe they can make a difference because they will be heard, they will make a difference. They will go beyond our expectations and great things will happen.
explicacao: Citação de Frederick Smith sobre temas ligados a lideranca. “In an environment where there is a shared vision of excellence, where people can be the best they…” articula lideranca, business, culture em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como culture e excellence-in-leadership.
